description: Director mode hooks (guard is installed dynamically by setup-director.sh)

hooks.prompt: Check if this Bash command is a `git push`. If it IS a git push: 1) Check if the most recent commit message starts with 'chore: bump version to' — if so, the version is already bumped, return 'approve'. 2) Otherwise, BLOCK the push. Return a JSON decision: {"decision": "block", "reason": "Version bump required before pushing. Bump the patch version in .claude-plugin/plugin.json, .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, and skills/director-mode/SKILL.md. Add a CHANGELOG.md entry for the new version. Commit the bump, then retry the push."}. If the command is NOT a git push, return 'approve' immediately.
